_metadata.description: UQBS learning-activity-to-LO mapping, extracted from Jac (curriculum.uq.edu.au) for the 43 courses affected by the published-ECP LO-mapping bug. Captured alongside the assessment overrides. Not currently consumed by the viewer — kept for a possible future activity overlay. Re-generate with scraper/jac_extract.js.
_metadata.source: Jac API: get-resources -> curriculums/v2/{cvid}/components (second mapping matrix)
_metadata.note: Each course also carries cvid/classId (the Jac instance the data came from). For multi-offering courses only the first Published instance is captured here.
